meaning: n.[医]自体移植物(如皮肤,组织等)
examples: In all cases, local autograft was used.
Use the autograft to replace the aortic root and then attach a pulmonary homograft.
Objective to investigate a new method to promote the growth potential of cartilage autograft.
Another type of tissue valve replacement that uses your own pulmonary valve (autograft) is sometimes possible.
The process, called a cultured epidermal autograft, was done more than 100 times in the United States last year, according to Genzyme.
